ddls:
CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "device_name" TEXT /* Name of the device */,
  "device_type_id" INTEGER /* Type of the device (e.g., smart meter) */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the device */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the device was installed */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographic location of the device */,
  "firmware_version" TEXT /* Version of the firmware installed on the device */,
  "hardware_version" TEXT /* Version of the hardware installed on the device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_devices_device_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_type_id") REFERENCES device_types ("device_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_types" (
  "device_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device type */,
  "device_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the device type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the device type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_points" (
  "data_point_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device that collected the data point */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the data point (e.g., ActiveExportRegister) */,
  "attribute_id" INTEGER /* Attribute of the data point (e.g., scale, unit, value) */,
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Method of the data point (e.g., measurement, calculation) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes about the data point */,
  "data_type_id" INTEGER /* Data type of the data point (e.g., INTEGER, FLOAT) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_point_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_data_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_type_id") REFERENCES data_types ("data_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("method_id") REFERENCES methods ("method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_attribute_id FOREIGN KEY ("attribute_id") REFERENCES attributes ("attribute_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attributes" (
  "attribute_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attribute */,
  "attribute_name" TEXT /* Name of the attribute */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the attribute */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attribute_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_types" (
  "data_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data type */,
  "data_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the data type (e.g., INTEGER, ENUMERATION) */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unit of the data type (e.g., Wh, VARh) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unit */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the unit */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the unit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "constant_data" (
  "constant_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each constant data point */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device that the constant data point belongs to */,
  "data_point_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point that the constant data point belongs to */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the constant data point */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the constant data point was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("constant_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_constant_data_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_constant_data_data_point_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_point_id") REFERENCES data_points ("data_point_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "operational_data" (
  "operational_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each operational data point */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device that collected the operational data point */,
  "data_point_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point that the operational data point belongs to */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the operational data point */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the operational data point was collected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("operational_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_operational_data_data_point_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_point_id") REFERENCES data_points ("data_point_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_operational_data_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, manager, viewer) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the device */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device that was accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access occurred */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user who accessed the device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "audit_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device that was affected */,
  "audit_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the action occurred */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., create, update, delete) */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Description of the changes made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data contained in the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., pdf, csv, excel) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_schedules" (
  "report_schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report schedule */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report that is scheduled */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who scheduled the report */,
  "schedule_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report is scheduled to be generated */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the report schedule (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_schedules_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_schedules_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_point_maps" (
  "data_point_map_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point map */,
  "data_point_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point that is mapped */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device that the data point is mapped to */,
  "map_type" TEXT /* Type of the map (e.g., one-to-one, one-to-many) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_point_map_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_point_maps_data_point_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_point_id") REFERENCES data_points ("data_point_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_point_maps_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)
